summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: BLUE blob (teardrop-like irregular) approximated by YELLOW grid of ε×ε squares (80-pt polygon boundary). ValueTracker eps_tr shrinks ε through {0.5, 0.3, 0.18, 0.1}; N squares grows, approximation improves. Live N, Nε² → blob area. Each square scales by |det A| under transformation.
